Create a new dashboard. 2. Add a **Text widget**. 3. Insert the following payload: ```html ``` ### Architectural Context Outerbase Cloud and its backend services were discontinued in 2025. The current version of Outerbase Studio operates purely as a client-side application, with dashboard data stored locally in the browser. ### Impact In the current architecture, the impact is limited to local self-XSS within a user's browser session. The previously described scenarios involving: - authentication token theft - account takeover - database access are no longer applicable since there are no active backend services or authentication tokens. ### Remediation The unsafe HTML rendering in the Text Widget has been removed in commit https://github.com/outerbase/studio/commit/b06fb85e5967440278d5a815721b360920566ab9 by eliminating the use of dangerouslySetInnerHTML.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wwf9-7jrc-rv4q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:18:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wwf9-7jrc-rv4q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wwf9-7jrc-rv4q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55650"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T21:18:44Z", "references": ["https://github.com/outerbase/studio/security/advisories/GHSA-wwf9-7jrc-rv4q", "https://github.com/outerbase/studio/commit/b06fb85e5967440278d5a815721b360920566ab9", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wwf9-7jrc-rv4q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/outerbase/studio/security-advisories/GHSA-wwf9-7jrc-rv4q", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/outerbase/studio", "summary": "Outerbase Studio: Stored XSS in Text Widget Leads to Authentication Token Exposure", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T21:18:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wwf9-7jrc-rv4q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@outerbase/studio"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.10.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Outerbase Studio: Stored XSS in Text Widget Leads to Authentication Token Exposure
